narrative:
Jackson Township has 4,229 registered voters, with 53.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 23.2 percentage points.
